title: R4 #285 — Due-Diligence catalog expansion (5 industry dossiers)

Added 5 industry-diverse dossiers: JNJ (healthcare), JPM (financial), MSFT (tech), XOM (energy), Koch (private/industrial)
Re-harvested all 10 catalog samples under comparable profile v1.1 schema; pinned lane INDEX to GroundTruth/DueDiligence
recap.state: GREEN — 10 dossiers (8 public, 2 private); 335 datums / 123 gaps; 97 harvested / 8 parked sources; public-sources-only policy intact
next: Wire due_diligence lane into Nexus stonebridge.due_diligence workflow deliverable mapping
Add paid-source escalation playbook (PACER, Lexis) as client-option appendix — not harvested

vcs_commit_draft.subject: R4 #285: Due-Diligence catalog — 5 industry dossiers + template v1.2
vcs_commit_draft.body:
RECAP
- Did: Template v1.2 (regulatory_standing, adverse_media); 5 new dossiers (JNJ/JPM/MSFT/XOM/Koch); harvester extended; 10-sample catalog pinned GroundTruth/DueDiligence
- State: GREEN — 335 datums, 123 gaps, public-sources-only; 8 public + 2 private entities across 7 industries
- Next: Nexus workflow deliverable wire; quarterly re-harvest cadence

CEILING: PACER/Lexis remain NOT FOUND by policy — client escalation playbook TBD.
